return(function(...)local S={"\090\115\053\076\122\073\090\072\081\081\099\122\050\107\053\114\082\077\061\061";"\120\114\049\054\047\081\049\054\121\115\113\097\121\074\088\104","\047\117\052\105\122\098\052\108\102\081\088\072\081\119\053\108","\108\101\061\061";"\090\073\106\089\047\104\049\066\043\082\106\068\082\086\090\054\047\111\072\061";"\047\117\118\061";"\115\056\071\089\050\081\068\061","";"\120\119\049\070\120\111\120\054\050\082\104\119\081\081\050\121","\050\114\084\099\050\085\061\061";"\085\087\048\085\076\108\105\061";"\052\081\084\070\052\074\088\086\043\049\053\072\121\054\084\053","\050\115\106\067\047\107\118\061","\120\098\050\111\090\087\113\117\121\074\099\066\081\086\049\051\120\072\061\061";"\115\056\071\099\050\115\113\097\052\111\084\057\047\111\110\061";"\120\074\049\099\047\107\050\104","\049\111\084\099\120\111\049\067\118\087\113\104\052\111\049\086\052\111\049\098\118\085\061\061";"\115\056\071\119\121\072\061\061";"\047\111\071\097\050\051\043\054\120\074\104\076\050\072\061\061";"\115\056\071\053\047\074\113\104\102\077\061\061";"\052\111\071\073\052\051\106\053\047\074\120\061";"\052\111\084\057\047\111\110\061","\050\074\088\070\047\107\118\061";"\047\111\049\076","\090\073\106\066\113\074\104\113\049\117\118\072\090\114\098\068";"\121\049\106\107\108\082\090\061";"\050\117\043\108\108\049\104\087\081\110\113\097\110\087\053\116\052\084\121\061";"\108\057\101\104\050\048\105\053\108\101\061\061","\120\107\113\067\122\081\079\119","\121\119\104\054\050\085\061\061";"\080\086\104\113\047\051\112\110\110\098\056\119\085\073\112\089","\052\111\084\073\122\072\061\061";"\052\107\052\065","\080\051\113\054\120\087\052\104\052\077\061\061";"\120\074\084\076\050\111\071\099";"\102\120\049\122\056\077\061\061","\049\114\049\057\122\111\071\070\122\072\061\061","\050\114\056\097\052\111\043\105";"\121\082\121\054\080\087\043\070\049\119\052\051\113\119\106\105\043\117\101\061","\102\115\050\118\122\087\106\057\102\119\104\108\080\117\050\099\085\101\061\061","\052 f,t in ipairs({{1020608+-1020607,837370+-837313};{437167-437166,-115620+115662},{-58402+58445;24154-24097}})do while t[-1024768+1024769]<t[-759864+759866]do S[t[384492+-384491]],S[t[-194724-(-194726)]],t[-198502+198503],t[-7966-(-7968)]=S[t[806139-806137]],S[t[774585-774584]],t[-756343+756344]+(-941693+941694),t[140454-140452]-(-678516-(-678517))end end local function f(f)return S[f-(-246056+281903)]end do local f=table.insert local t=string.sub local D=type local I=S local b={i=140812-140772,a=-417197+417230;p=10529-10528,["\051"]=905788+-905781;o=694140-694134;y=380292-380268,P=161061+-161043;x=-855455-(-855483),h=-636047-(-636084),A=315434+-315392;l=432749+-432735;["\052"]=-497839+497868,F=626483+-626436,W=1007743+-1007739,S=-199020-(-199078);C=-503678-(-503728);t=705985-705974;f=-640470-(-640500),["\056"]=-632703-(-632756);U=852874-852858,b=709622+-709586,["\055"]=436013-435950;r=652970-652916,s=884603+-884580;n=-401772+401792;m=-59687-(-59746),T=-249128+249133;N=290025+-290015,w=349778-349739;K=838281-838266;Z=733251-733239,["\043"]=175781+-175768;j=808194-808185;Q=-291945+291967;I=-641332+641383,["\057"]=-97345-(-97379);u=477938-477935,["\050"]=-1018368+1018393,G=322154+-322093,e=13952-13920,M=1047616+-1047616,v=-470823-(-470831);J=216615+-216577;k=876658-876603;["\053"]=445591-445550;q=390764+-390747;D=-550329-(-550385);["\054"]=-804921+804973;["\048"]=154917+-154915,["\049"]=-45324-(-45345),R=450561-450542,O=292066-292009,V=424400-424365;B=219175+-219132;L=884905-884859,c=81296-81251,H=1004911-1004863;E=48930+-48899,z=28641+-28615;g=764856+-764796,d=923451-923389;["\047"]=35105+-35078,Y=-242792+242836,X=-501168+501217}local U=math.floor local B=table.concat local c=string.char local u=string.len for S=243561-243560,#I,674870-674869 do local W=I[S]if D(W)=="\115\116\114\105\110\103"then local D=u(W)local l={}local Q==-791865+791869 then Q=-347755+347755 local S=U(y/(-398636+464172))local t=U((y%(-46817+112353))/(895996-895740))local D=y%(14176-13920)f(l,c(S,t,D))y=666613-666613 end elseif S=="\061"then end end return(function(S,D,I,b,U,B,c,K,F,d,l,E,W,u,J,r,y,e,t,Q,H)K,y,E,d,Q,u,W,l,H,t,J,e,r,F=function(S,f)local D=y(f)local I=function(I)return t(S,{I},f,D)end return I end,function(S)for f=-715829-(-715830),#S,-762168+762169 do W[S[f]]=W[S[f]]+(763065-763064)end if I then local t=I(true)local b({},{[f(-75353-(-111203))]=Q,[f(741122-705270)]=S,[f(-164206-(-200102))]=function()return 979838+1589073 end})end end,function(S,f)local D=y(f)local I=function(I,b,U,B,c)return t(S,{I,b;U;B,c},f,D)end return I end,function(S,f)local D=y(f)local I=function(I,b)return t(S,{I;b},f,D)end return I end,function(S)local f,t=284394-284393,S[-1022527-(-1022528)]while t do end,function(S,f)local D=y(f)local I=function(I,b,U,B)return t(S,{I,b,U;B},f,D)end return I end return(r(-208550+15381621,{}))(D(c))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[f(-542097-(-577970))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
